description.value:
1 or 3

Frequency once per day

Requirements You have at least one hand free.

You carefully balance with the aid of only a few arms, freeing the rest to snag anything around you. As you do, your limbs elongate and writhe. Until combat ends, you're knocked out, or you Dismiss All-Grabber Stance, you can make lashing limb Strikes. These deal @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]] damage, are in the brawling group, have the grapple and unarmed traits, and have a reach of 15 feet. You can also use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Hug the World] activity. If you spent 3 actions to use All-Grabber Stance, you can immediately Hug the World.
